title: Service bicycle drivetrain systems
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Service bicycle drivetrain systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to service bicycle drivetrain system

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and other relevant technical information are accessed and interpreted 1.3 Condition of bicycle drivetrain system is inspected for faults and worn or damaged components using visual inspection methods and by comparing measurements against manufacturer specifications1.4 Service options and techniques are identified and confirmed with customer1.5 Replacement parts for drivetrain are identified and sourced as required1.6 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.7 Tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are selected and checked for serviceability1.8 Work area is prepared and service sequence planned to avoid damage to bicycle, minimise waste and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and other relevant technical information are accessed and interpreted 1.3 Condition of bicycle drivetrain system is inspected for faults and worn or damaged components using visual inspection methods and by comparing measurements against manufacturer specifications1.4 Service options and techniques are identified and confirmed with customer1.5 Replacement parts for drivetrain are identified and sourced as required1.6 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.7 Tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are selected and checked for serviceability1.8 Work area is prepared and service sequence planned to avoid damage to bicycle, minimise waste and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and other relevant technical information are accessed and interpreted 1.3 Condition of bicycle drivetrain system is inspected for faults and worn or damaged components using visual inspection methods and by comparing measurements against manufacturer specifications1.4 Service options and techniques are identified and confirmed with customer1.5 Replacement parts for drivetrain are identified and sourced as required1.6 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.7 Tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are selected and checked for serviceability1.8 Work area is prepared and service sequence planned to avoid damage to bicycle, minimise waste and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to service bicycle drivetrain system

elements.title: Carry out service of drivetrain system

pcs.text: Bicycle drivetrain system is serviced according to work plan, manufacturer specifications, and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Replacement parts are checked and fitted according to manufacturer specifications2.3 Operation of serviced drivetrain system is tested and adjusted as required according to job requirements and workplace procedures2.4 Results and quality issues are reported to authorised personnel as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Bicycle drivetrain system is serviced according to work plan, manufacturer specifications, and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Replacement parts are checked and fitted according to manufacturer specifications2.3 Operation of serviced drivetrain system is tested and adjusted as required according to job requirements and workplace procedures2.4 Results and quality issues are reported to authorised personnel as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Bicycle drivetrain system is serviced according to work plan, manufacturer specifications, and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Replacement parts are checked and fitted according to manufacturer specifications2.3 Operation of serviced drivetrain system is tested and adjusted as required according to job requirements and workplace procedures2.4 Results and quality issues are reported to authorised personnel as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out service of drivetrain system

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work meets workplace expectations and bicycle is presented ready for use3.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored3.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures3.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedure

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
